title: rubus oxybelus
intro: Rubus oxybelus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan bramble, is a type of flowering plant in the rose family. It is primarily known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Rubus oxybelus include its ability to reduce swelling, promote healing, and provide antioxidant protection. It can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves for topical use, although further research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential side effects.
